entity.summary: Solana order-book decentralized exchange supporting crypto, stock-linked, and real-world-asset markets with current liquidity, user activity, and substantial recent spot volume.
entity.notes: The first-party site remains reachable. Current protocol data reports continuing Solana TVL, substantial 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day DEX volume, and current user activity. HEI therefore classifies Archer Exchange as active.

evidence.title: Archer Exchange official site
evidence.notes: The current first-party site remains reachable and preserves the Archer Exchange identity.

evidence.title: Archer Exchange protocol profile
evidence.notes: Current protocol data identifies Archer Exchange as a Solana order-book DEX for crypto, stock-linked, and real-world-asset markets.

evidence.title: Archer Exchange DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: Current Solana TVL, recent volume, active addresses, and transactions support an active classification.
